_comment: Plugin-mode hook registration. Referenced by ../../.claude-plugin/plugin.json. ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} resolves to the dharness install dir (read-only); the scripts themselves write to ${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/_workspace/_memory/... via _schema.REPO_ROOT. Mirror of .claude/settings.local.json hooks block but rooted at the plugin instead of the project. Do NOT install both at once for the same project — duplicate firings.
